title: uragoga longistipulata
intro: Uragoga longistipulata, also known as the uraga tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Uragoga longistipulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
